_doc: recommend deductive engine: bands map normalized_score to Pick buckets; exclusions are the cache-backed hard gates (score<floor, recent exploit, recent depeg deep-only, measured dynamic-0 deep-only); display sizes the views and the high-APY exclusion callout. bands must stay in sync with score's config/scoring.json grades (same 80/65/50/30 boundaries) so a pick's displayed grade matches its bucket.
